prompt: In Pro Mode, write and run Python to generate a synthetic dose-response dataset, fit multiple candidate nonlinear models, estimate uncertainty with bootstrap confidence intervals, save result.json and outputs/model_comparison.png, and justify the selected model for a skeptical methods reviewer.

In Pro Mode, write and run Python to generate a synthetic set of microscopy-like field-of-view images, extract region-level features, cluster the fields of view, save result.json, outputs/report.md, and outputs/qc_overview.png, then explain which images are outliers and why.
